caption: An older woman with curly grey hair, wearing glasses, gold hoop earrings, and a red blazer, is seated in a black office chair. She is positioned in an office setting with a light-colored filing cabinet and stacks of folders visible in the background. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, and her facial expressions shift from a wide, open-mouthed smile to a more serious and focused expression. In the initial moments, she appears to be laughing or smiling broadly, but as the scene progresses, her mouth closes slightly and her brow furrows, indicating a change in tone or topic during her conversation. Her head remains relatively centered in the frame, though she slightly shifts her gaze and posture as she speaks. There is no on-screen text or logos present in the scene.
